creator: wollman@FreeBSD.org
text:
The canonical name (going back >20 years) has always been ftp5.freebsd.org, and I don't think anyone ever coordinated with us about adding ftp5.us.freebsd.org as an alias.  I've updated the configuration.

Honestly, I haven't paid much attention to this service because we were told more than a decade ago that the project was no longer going to support third-party-operated mirrors. A clearer policy statement would be appreciated.
